generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are actually benefiting more from our security commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to protect shared interests, some members are barely meeting their financial obligations. It's time we focus on securing OUR borders and OUR people first. #AmericaFirst #NATOReform
